Package org.rodinp.core.tests.relations

Class ItemRelationParserTests

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.core.tests.relations.AbstractItemRelationParserTests
org.rodinp.core.tests.relations.ItemRelationParserTests
public class ItemRelationParserTests extends AbstractItemRelationParserTests
Unit tests for class ItemRelationParser. It covers the following successful cases:
  • a relation with a valid child item,
  • a relation with a valid child attribute,
  • a relation with both a valid child item and a valid child attribute.
It covers inner (resp. outer relation) failure cases due to ill-formed configuration elements and asserts that do not have side-effects on the parent relation (resp. on valid relations aside).
The types of failure tested are the following :
  • unknown tag,
  • missing attribute,
  • invalid attribute value.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    invalidAttributeValueFailure()
    Ensures that an empty relationship (case: invalid id attribute value of the child attribute type ) is detected and ignored, and does not disturb the parsing of surrounding valid relationships.
    void
    invalidChildValueFailure()
    Ensures that an empty relationship (case: invalid child element type value) is detected and ignored, and does not disturb the parsing of surrounding valid relationships.
    void
    invalidRelationValueFailure()
    Ensures that an empty relationship (case: invalid parent type id value) is detected and ignored, and does not disturb the parsing of surrounding valid relationships.
    void
    invalidValueChildAttributeRelationFailure()
    Ensures that an ill-formed child element with an invalid attribute is ignored and does not disturb the parsing of the relationship it is defined in.
    void
    missingAttributeChildElementRelationFailure()
    Ensures that an ill-formed child element with a missing attribute is detected and ignored and does not disturb the parsing of the relationship it is defined in.
    void
    missingAttributeFailure()
    Ensures that an empty relationship (case: missing id attribute of the child attribute type) is detected and ignored, and does not disturb the parsing of surrounding valid relationships.
    void
    missingChildAttributeFailure()
    Ensures that an empty relationship (case: missing id attribute of the child element type) is detected and ignored, and does not disturb the parsing of surrounding valid relationships.
    void
    missingRelationId()
    Ensures that an empty relationship (case: invalid parent type id) is detected and ignored, and does not disturb the parsing of surrounding valid relationships.
    void
    unknownChildElementRelationFailure()
    Ensures that an unknown child element is detected and ignored and does not disturb the parsing of the relationship it is defined in.
    void
    unknownChildFailure()
    Ensures that an empty relationship (case: unknown child tag) is detected and ignored, and does not disturb the parsing of surrounding valid relationships.
    void
    unknownTagFailure()
    Ensures that an empty relationship (case: not a relationship element) is detected and ignored, and does not disturb the parsing of surrounding valid relationships.
    void
    validBothChildren()
    Ensures that a one-to-many mixed parent-child relationship is correctly parsed.
    void
    validChildAttribute()
    Ensures that a valid one-to-one parent-child relationship between an element p and an attribute attr is correctly parsed.
    void
    validChildItem()
    Ensures that a valid one-to-one parent-child relationship between two element types p and child is correctly parsed.

  • Method Details

    • validChildItem

      public void validChildItem()
      Ensures that a valid one-to-one parent-child relationship between two element types p and child is correctly parsed.

    • validChildAttribute

      public void validChildAttribute()
      Ensures that a valid one-to-one parent-child relationship between an element p and an attribute attr is correctly parsed.

    • validBothChildren

      public void validBothChildren()
      Ensures that a one-to-many mixed parent-child relationship is correctly parsed.

    • unknownChildElementRelationFailure

      public void unknownChildElementRelationFailure()
      Ensures that an unknown child element is detected and ignored and does not disturb the parsing of the relationship it is defined in.

    • missingAttributeChildElementRelationFailure

      public void missingAttributeChildElementRelationFailure()
      Ensures that an ill-formed child element with a missing attribute is detected and ignored and does not disturb the parsing of the relationship it is defined in.

    • invalidValueChildAttributeRelationFailure

      public void invalidValueChildAttributeRelationFailure()
      Ensures that an ill-formed child element with an invalid attribute is ignored and does not disturb the parsing of the relationship it is defined in.

    • unknownChildFailure

      public void unknownChildFailure()
      Ensures that an empty relationship (case: unknown child tag) is detected and ignored, and does not disturb the parsing of surrounding valid relationships.

    • unknownTagFailure

      public void unknownTagFailure()
      Ensures that an empty relationship (case: not a relationship element) is detected and ignored, and does not disturb the parsing of surrounding valid relationships.

    • missingRelationId

      public void missingRelationId()
      Ensures that an empty relationship (case: invalid parent type id) is detected and ignored, and does not disturb the parsing of surrounding valid relationships.

    • invalidRelationValueFailure

      public void invalidRelationValueFailure()
      Ensures that an empty relationship (case: invalid parent type id value) is detected and ignored, and does not disturb the parsing of surrounding valid relationships.

    • missingChildAttributeFailure

      public void missingChildAttributeFailure()
      Ensures that an empty relationship (case: missing id attribute of the child element type) is detected and ignored, and does not disturb the parsing of surrounding valid relationships.

    • invalidChildValueFailure

      public void invalidChildValueFailure()
      Ensures that an empty relationship (case: invalid child element type value) is detected and ignored, and does not disturb the parsing of surrounding valid relationships.

    • missingAttributeFailure

      public void missingAttributeFailure()
      Ensures that an empty relationship (case: missing id attribute of the child attribute type) is detected and ignored, and does not disturb the parsing of surrounding valid relationships.

    • invalidAttributeValueFailure

      public void invalidAttributeValueFailure()
      Ensures that an empty relationship (case: invalid id attribute value of the child attribute type ) is detected and ignored, and does not disturb the parsing of surrounding valid relationships.
